title: Preferences
description: User interface preferences, persisted in settings.yaml.

name.description: Unused for the single preferences document; retained for envelope uniformity.

createdAt.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp stamped by sauron when the document was created; never hand-edited.

lastUpdatedAt.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp stamped by sauron on the document's most recent write; never hand-edited.

theme.description: The active terminal UI color theme; sauron (dark) is the default.
